recover.name: Recover Orphan Terminal-Labeled Issues
recover.description: Find OPEN issues that both triager and orchestrator skip — issues carrying ≥1 workflow label with zero actionable labels — and strip every orphan workflow label via gh issue edit --remove-label so the issue falls back to unlabeled state and becomes eligible for triager on the next run. Predicates derived dynamically from the workflow JSON (labelMapping + prioritizer.labels + phases.<phase>.type). No kind:* assignment here — triager owns classification.
